mapper.select: SELECT * FROM compare_lib WHERE lib_code = #{libCode} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM compare_lib WHERE is_enabled = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY lib_name ASC
SELECT * FROM compare_lib WHERE lib_type = #{libType} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY lib_name ASC
SELECT lib_type as libType, COUNT(*) as count FROM compare_lib WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY lib_type
SELECT cl.* FROM compare_lib cl INNER JOIN rule_lib_relation rlr ON cl.id = rlr.lib_id WHERE rlr.rule_id = #{ruleId} AND cl.is_deleted = 0 AND rlr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cl.lib_name ASC
